temporal_description: The video opens with a shaky, handheld shot moving through a dark, narrow corridor. The walls are a grimy, pale green, and the lighting is dim, casting deep shadows. On the left, a faint light source illuminates a wall with some indistinct markings. On the right, a small, dark, square opening is visible in the wall. In the top left corner, the white Chinese characters "风行网" are displayed. The camera continues to move forward, revealing more of the dark, oppressive space. A red, diamond-shaped object with a white character on it briefly comes into focus before the camera pans past it. The "风行网" text remains on screen. The camera then cuts to a medium shot of a man in a dark suit and tie, standing in front of a wall covered in large, tattered maps. He is looking down at a document in his hands. The maps behind him are old and worn, with various markings and lines drawn on them. The "风行网" text is still visible in the top left corner. The man looks up from the document and turns to face the camera, speaking with a serious expression. A man speaks in a serious and slightly concerned tone, as if presenting important information in a meeting. His voice is steady but carries a sense of urgency. "但是交货的地点还不知道" (But the delivery location is still unknown). The background is filled with a tense, suspenseful musical score. The music is rhythmic and percussive, creating a feeling of anticipation and intrigue, as if leading up to a crucial revelation or a critical moment in a story. The camera remains focused on him as he continues to speak, gesturing slightly with the paper he holds. The maps in the background are slightly out of focus, emphasizing the man as the central figure.
